session.user: Run `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest packages/erk-mcp/tests/ -v` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors — just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on erk-mcp tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
